steps.title: Set up the product
steps.content: The function gives the product of $x$ and a number that is $84$ more than $x$. The second number is $(x+84)$, so we write: $$f(x) = x(x+84)$$

steps.title: Expand using the distributive property
steps.content: $$f(x) = x(x+84) = x \cdot x + x \cdot 84 = x^2 + 84x$$ That confirms C is correct.
